### **Hydration Notes:**
- Drink 3L water daily minimum
- Add electrolyte tablet during intense workouts (>60 min)

### **Prep Time Tips:**
- Batch cook chicken & rice on Sunday (reheats in 2 min)
- Pre-cut vegetables the night before
- Use frozen broccoli & asparagus (no prep needed)
- Keep canned salmon as backup protein option

### **Budget-Friendly Swaps:**
- Chicken breast cheaper than salmon (swap 2-3x weekly)
- White rice cheaper than brown rice
- Eggs are most cost-effective protein source
- Buy honey & tahini in bulk
